summary: Phase-34 (Automation Engine + Add-to-run) fully validated end-to-end. All 7 backend pytest cases PASS in 7s (catalog of 14 items, execute without/with run_id writes correctly, add-check idempotency, 3 Playwright browser tests pass, RBAC blocks client with 403). Frontend e2e flow PASS on preview URL: admin login → sidebar QA Playbook → landing shows qa-ai-suggester + qa-automation-panel (14 checkboxes) → create run 'TEST_UI Add Test' → AI Suggester returned 12 cards for 'Health check endpoint' (HC-01..HC-05 etc.) → clicked qa-ai-add-HC-01 → button text='adăugat' & disabled, check appended → Automation panel in sidebar → Selectează tot (14) → Execută → 'Sumar: 14 pass / 0 fail / 14 total · 14 scrise în run' rendered in qa-auto-summary → backend run state confirmed: total_checks=120 (=105 default + 14 automated + 1 AI), pass=14, automated=14, ai_added=1.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminQAPlaybook.jsx is 674 lines — still warrants splitting (AISuggester + AutomationPanel + RunView) per iteration_34 advice. Not blocking.
qa_automation.py inlines large multi-line Playwright templates as f-strings; consider moving these to /app/backend/qa_automation_browser_templates.py for clarity (minor).
execute_tests writes results to run with separate find_one + update_one calls per result; could be batched but parallel safety is preserved by checking existing each time. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 QA runs during testing ('TEST_phase34_auto' & 'TEST_UI Add Test') — both deleted from propmanage_db.qa_runs at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com. Sidebar to QA Playbook is the button text='QA Playbook' (no direct /admin/qa-playbook route — it is a tab inside /admin AdminConsole). The run-creation input testid is qa-new-run-name (NOT qa-run-create-name) and submit is qa-create-run-btn. Automation Engine fully functional — 14 tests pass in ~5s wall-time (parallel httpx + 3 Playwright subprocesses). Default checklist seeds 105 items; after one AI add + 14 automation runs the run holds 120 checks (105 + 14 automated + 1 ai_added). qa-auto-summary text format is 'Sumar: X pass / Y fail / N total · M scrise în run'. add-check is idempotent on (run_id, code).
verified_ui_flows: P0 sidebar 'QA Playbook' click → landing renders qa-ai-suggester + qa-automation-panel + 14 qa-auto-cb-* checkboxes
P0 create run TEST_UI Add Test → run view qa-run-name visible
P0 AI suggester for 'Health check endpoint' → returned HC-01..HC-05+ cards each with qa-ai-add-{CODE} + header qa-ai-add-all
P0 click qa-ai-add-HC-01 → button becomes 'adăugat' + disabled + run-check count increases
P0 Automation panel visible in run view sidebar with 14 checkboxes
P0 qa-auto-select-all → all 14 checked → qa-auto-execute → qa-auto-summary='Sumar: 14 pass / 0 fail / 14 total · 14 scrise în run'
P0 progress counters update: backend reports pass=14, automated=14, ai_added=1, total=120
